description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical beverage can with a metallic finish, predominantly colored in deep red with black graphic splatters and urban motifs. The front features the bold 'Red Bull' logo in large red letters, accompanied by the iconic yellow sun and two red bulls charging at each other. The can's surface is decorated with abstract black patterns, giving it a dynamic, energetic appearance. The top is silver with a standard pull-tab opening, typical of aluminum cans. The back and sides of the can are mostly red with some black graphic elements, and no additional text or branding is visible. The can appears undamaged, with a smooth, glossy surface and no visible dents or scratches.
description: A tall, red and black metallic can with the 'Red Bull' logo and dynamic urban graphics, featuring a silver pull-tab top and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Red Bull' logo, yellow sun, and two red bulls with bold black graphic splatters.
description_view_1: Side view with partial logo text and more abstract black graphics, less branding visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by solid deep red color with minimal graphic detail and no visible branding.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the edge of the logo and swirling black graphic elements.
attribute_label_or_branding: The can features the 'Red Bull' logo in large red letters, a yellow sun, and two red bulls on the front, with black urban graphic splatters and abstract motifs. The branding is bold and centrally placed.
